response.global_analysis: The audio consists entirely of conversational dialogue between VTubers and instrumental background music. No vocal songs or sung lyrics are present. I am relying on the audio waveform to precisely time the speech and using the visual context (character names, game events) for transcription and translation accuracy. The reference JSON correctly identifies the absence of vocal music.

subtitles.original: And she's on the race! She goes to the first loop!
subtitles.english: And she's on the race! She goes to the first loop!

subtitles.original: Let's see if she can finish. Oh!
subtitles.english: Let's see if she can finish. Oh!

subtitles.original: Okay, Sora-chan... Sora-chan, she's going fast!
subtitles.english: Okay, Sora-chan... Sora-chan, she's going fast!

subtitles.original: Okay, the last loop is the start.
subtitles.english: Okay, the last loop is the start.

subtitles.original: She's got this! She's so safe! Oh!
subtitles.english: She's got this! She's so safe! Oh!

subtitles.original: That's on the straight! The last burst is so difficult!
subtitles.english: That's on the straight! The last burst is so difficult!

subtitles.original: Now the finish line! The finish line!
subtitles.english: Now the finish line! The finish line!

subtitles.original: Okay, now we are checking the final time. So...
subtitles.english: Okay, now we are checking the final time. So...

subtitles.original: in the meantime, how was it? How did you think?
subtitles.english: in the meantime, how was it? How did you think?

subtitles.original: Ah, I think I did great!
subtitles.english: Ah, I think I did great!

subtitles.original: Okay, let's look at the time!
subtitles.english: Okay, let's look at the time!

subtitles.original: Oh! One minute and three seconds!
subtitles.english: Oh! One minute and three seconds!

subtitles.original: And you got one explosion, so three seconds is added.
subtitles.english: And you got one explosion, so three seconds is added.

subtitles.original: But very fun! Sora-chan! Yes, Sora!
subtitles.english: But very fun! Sora-chan! Yes, Sora!

subtitles.original: Who will be our next challenger?
subtitles.english: Who will be our next challenger?

subtitles.original: is there anything you would like to say to the audience or Senpai or anybody?
subtitles.english: is there anything you would like to say to the audience or Senpai or anybody?

subtitles.original: I will show you my Holo-Monkey style! Nice driving!
subtitles.english: I will show you my Holo-Monkey style! Nice driving!

subtitles.original: Okay, she sounds very, very sure about herself.
subtitles.english: Okay, she sounds very, very sure about herself.

subtitles.original: Let's see, let's see if she can put her skills to the test.
subtitles.english: Let's see, let's see if she can put her skills to the test.

subtitles.original: Alright, the Holokart Time Attack starts...
subtitles.english: Alright, the Holokart Time Attack starts...

subtitles.original: Okay, okay, okay, you got this!
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, okay, you got this!

subtitles.original: Stay away! Go away from me! No!
subtitles.english: Stay away! Go away from me! No!

subtitles.original: I don't want to die! No!
subtitles.english: I don't want to die! No!

subtitles.original: Yeah! I'm alive! Yes, she's alive!
subtitles.english: Yeah! I'm alive! Yes, she's alive!

subtitles.original: We're checking the time now, but let's hear it. Are you okay from the challenger?
subtitles.english: We're checking the time now, but let's hear it. Are you okay from the challenger?

subtitles.original: Are you okay? Are you okay?
subtitles.english: Are you okay? Are you okay?

subtitles.original: I will never drive. I might kill someone.
subtitles.english: I will never drive. I might kill someone.

subtitles.original: That might be, that might be for the best, you know?
subtitles.english: That might be, that might be for the best, you know?

subtitles.original: Yes, I have to be your Sensei and Senpai.
subtitles.english: Yes, I have to be your Sensei and Senpai.

subtitles.original: Yes! Wow! One minute and nine seconds!
subtitles.english: Yes! Wow! One minute and nine seconds!

subtitles.original: You received five explosions, so five penalties,
subtitles.english: You received five explosions, so five penalties,

subtitles.original: a total of fifteen second penalty.
subtitles.english: a total of fifteen second penalty.

subtitles.original: So that means I was worse than Sora-chan Senpai.
subtitles.english: So that means I was worse than Sora-chan Senpai.

subtitles.original: You were, but you hit the stuff so you're silver.
subtitles.english: You were, but you hit the stuff so you're silver.
